commits: 89c8c82: feat(slash-commands): add Codex custom skills loader (.codex/skills/)
summary: All 5 tasks for Issue #166 (Codex custom skills loader) are implemented and verified. Task 1.1: SlashCommandSource type updated with 'codex-skill', cliTools JSDoc corrected. Task 1.2: loadCodexSkills() function implemented with path traversal defense, size/count limits, os.homedir() default. Task 1.3: getSlashCommandGroups() extended to include local Codex skills when basePath is provided. Task 1.4: D009 comment corrected to accurately describe filterCommandsByCliTool() behavior. Task 2.1: Worktree API route updated with global Codex skills loading and sources.codexSkill count. All 4984 unit tests pass, TypeScript type check clean, ESLint clean.
